title: Merchant: Syracuse can do better removing snow from downtown streets (Your Letters)
summary: Letter to editor from downtown merchant James Horan criticizing Syracuse's snow removal performance on side streets and parking lanes in the Downtown Business District. Writer acknowledges success of sidewalk clearing efforts but calls for enforcement of alternate-side parking rules and improved street snow removal to match the city's reputation, citing last year's poor performance that created hazardous ice conditions.

political_signal.description: Downtown business stakeholder expressing frustration with recurring snow removal deficiency and advocating for improved service delivery and parking rule enforcement
